item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2min Given the fact no one was interested 4 years ago (scared of losing their
item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2min Given the fact no one was interested 4 years ago (scared of losing their jobs) and I have worked with people on the front line to sort this and you chime up with this. Keep grifting like you do! Cita Liam Firkin @AntepostValue · 5min I assume the banging of this drum was precisely TO GET OTHERS to take notice and join the conversation against these checks?
Now annoyed that people are
Seemingly more important to be the bastion of flying the “moral” flag than actually wanting to effect change x.com/barstewardsthe… 1 3 85

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 1min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe A f*cking tipstar winner you can't make t
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 1min En respuesta a @BarstewardsThe A f*cking tipstar winner you can't make this tweet up. 17

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 19min “We always viewed him as a horse that would turn into a Coventry/Dewhurst type horse"
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 19min “We always viewed him as a horse that would turn into a Coventry/Dewhurst type horse"
Great Barrier Reef creates a big impression on debut at the Curragh... De attheraces.com 1 7 2 mil
